evals.prompt: /omv-dedup npm-demo-prototype-pollution using a sanitized duplicate advisory fixture
evals.expected_output: Shows NVD/GHSA/OSV/ecosystem queries and marks likely duplicate with High risk.

evals.prompt: /omv-dedup python-demo-redos using a sanitized duplicate identifier fixture
evals.expected_output: Recognizes likely duplicate from matching package, affected range, CWE, and sink behavior.
Uses no higher than Medium risk because sink and affected range are not confirmed.
Marks Low risk and writes no Evidence.v1 fields without confirmation.
Writes dedup.nvd_searched, ghsa_searched, ecosystem_db_searched, existing_cve, and notes.
